title: Add gateway message-contract wraparound coverage
description: Reviews for project-LICHEN-t2hn.7.2 noted that the bounded gateway message contract queue has copy/pop and full-queue coverage, but no pop-then-push FIFO wraparound test after s_head advances. Add native_sim coverage for wraparound without physical hardware.
notes:
Implemented native_sim gateway message-contract FIFO wraparound coverage in lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter/src/main.c. The test now derives TEST_MESSAGE_CONTRACT_QUEUE_DEPTH from CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_GATEWAY_MESSAGE_QUEUE_DEPTH, fills the bounded queue, pops once to advance s_head, pushes one more message to force tail wraparound, and drains/asserts FIFO order, has_id, ids, payload bytes, payload_len, and final -ENOENT.

Code reviews: Popper initial review found no issues; Hypatia initial review raised P2 findings that the test used hardcoded queue depth and did not assert submitted.has_id before checking IDs. Fixed both by tying the macro to Kconfig and asserting has_id on every popped message. Popper follow-up and Hypatia follow-up both found no remaining issues.

Local checks: git diff --check passed.

EC2 validation: launched temporary builder i-0252ee32af9aff374 in us-east-2a with profile AdministratorAccess-921772462201, attached EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 at /mnt/lichen-zephyr, mounted LABEL=LICHEN_ZEPHYR, ran /mnt/lichen-zephyr/scripts/bootstrap-host.sh and sourced /mnt/lichen-zephyr/env.sh. Validation worktree: /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn721-validate from origin/main plus local patch. Command: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -p native_sim --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-message-wrap --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen. Result: 2 scenarios selected, 1 configuration executed and passed, 1 skipped by static filter, 47 test cases executed, 0 failures, 0 errors, 0 warnings, 53.83 seconds. Build size: text=271757 data=7455 bss=75444 dec=354656 for twister-out-message-wrap/native_sim/net.lichen.meshtastic_gateway_adapter.native/zephyr/zephyr.elf.

EC2 cleanup: sync and unmount completed, vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 detached and verified available with empty attachments, instance i-0252ee32af9aff374 terminated, security group sg-09852c5a4a98c5028 deleted, temporary key lichen-t2hn721-20260702085307 deleted, local temporary key/patch/known_hosts files removed.
close_reason: Completed native_sim gateway message-contract pop-then-push FIFO wraparound coverage; reviewed, tested via EC2 Twister, evidence recorded in notes.
